story_summary: A lineage montage cycles through five archival or lifestyle cards labeled Mom, Dad, Fell in Love, Had me, and Me, using simple white stroked text overlays to tell a family arc.

source_sampling.method: ffprobe metadata plus scene-cut review and midpoint-frame extraction
source_sampling.notes: Exact cuts land at 5.700000, 10.033333, 15.200000, and 17.666667 seconds. Each card is a still image with a single short white label placed in a different part of the frame.

audio_notes: Audio was extracted directly from the input video into source_audio.mp3 and should be used as the default Shotstack audio source.

scenes.summary: Vintage-looking beach photo of the subject’s mother walking toward the camera in a striped bikini with hills and water behind her.
on_screen_text: White stroked label in the upper-right reads “Mom 🇪🇨”.
scenes.environment: Outdoor beach with hazy hills and shoreline.

scenes.summary: Portrait photo of the subject’s father in a white tank top and jeans against a warm indoor backdrop.
on_screen_text: White stroked label in the upper-left reads “Dad 🇨🇺”.

scenes.summary: A smiling couple embrace in a posed photo, representing the parents falling in love.
on_screen_text: White stroked label near the left-middle reads “Fell in ❤️”.
scenes.environment: Indoor portrait setting with window light.

scenes.summary: Childhood photo of the narrator sitting with Santa while holding a wrapped gift.
on_screen_text: White stroked label in the upper-left reads “Had me 🇪🇨”.
scenes.environment: Holiday photo set with Santa and winter backdrop.

scenes.summary: Present-day gym mirror selfie of the narrator standing in shorts, T-shirt, and sneakers among weight machines.
on_screen_text: White stroked label in the lower-left reads “Me 🇪🇨”.
scenes.environment: Modern gym interior with weights and machines.
